title: ocimum circinatum
intro: Ocimum circinatum is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae, commonly known as a type of wild basil or bush basil. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ocimum circinatum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory health, and providing relief from digestive issues, such as bloating and cramps. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, essential oil, or dried leaves, which can be used in a variety of herbal preparations, including infusions, salves, and topical creams.
